description: GCP Setup Documentation + Config Integration. Create docs/GCP_SETUP.md with step-by-step GCP project setup instructions, update backend/app/config.py with Firestore config, and update both .env.example files with all necessary vars.
steps: Create docs/GCP_SETUP.md with comprehensive GCP setup instructions covering: creating a GCP project, enabling APIs (Google Calendar API, Google Tasks API, Cloud Text-to-Speech API, Generative Language API), creating OAuth 2.0 credentials (Web application type) with redirect URI http://localhost:3000/api/auth/callback/google, required OAuth scopes (calendar, tasks, email, profile), getting a Gemini API key from AI Studio, and setting up environment variables.
Update backend/app/config.py: Add FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID (defaults to GCP_PROJECT_ID), FIRESTORE_DATABASE (defaults to '(default)'), and MCP_GMAIL_PATH field.

Update backend/.env.example to include all vars: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GEMINI_API_KEY, GCP_API_KEY, GCP_PROJECT_ID, FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID, FIRESTORE_DATABASE, HOST, PORT, FRONTEND_ORIGIN, MCP_CALENDAR_PATH, MCP_TASKS_PATH, MCP_GMAIL_PATH.
Update frontend/.env.example to include: NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET (needed by NextAuth for token refresh).
acceptance_criteria: docs/GCP_SETUP.md exists with clear step-by-step instructions covering all listed topics
backend/app/config.py has Firestore config fields (FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID, FIRESTORE_DATABASE) and MCP_GMAIL_PATH
Both .env.example files contain all required variables with descriptive comments
Python can import the updated config without errors: python -c 'from app.config import settings'
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/backend && python -c 'from app.config import settings; print(settings.model_fields.keys())'
